name: supplement-formula-pipeline
description: Amazon US dietary supplement competitive analysis and differentiated formula development toolkit. 5 chained skills: ingredient risk check, safe rebuild, formula optimization, ingredient-traffic boundary analysis, audience-satellite formula finalizer.
descriptionZh: Amazon US 保健品竞品分析与差异化配方开发全套工具链。5 个串联技能：成分风险查验、安全重建、配方优化、成分流量边界分析、受众卫星配方收口。从竞品 ASIN / Supplement Facts / Sif 关键词 Excel 出发，输出风险报告、安全替代方案、配方升级方案、雷达图和最终配方简报。
